title: Quick check: Walk-forward and live transition

choices.text: Walk-forward efficiency = OOS returns / IS returns. >0.5 edge generalizes. 0.3-0.5 marginal. <0.3 overfit. Sum across rolling train/test windows.
Paper 3 months → micro-live 1% capital 3-6 months → scaled 25% target → full deployment. Live edge usually < backtest by 20-50% due to slippage / regime / decay. Start tiny.

questions.explanation: Graduated risk: paper → micro → scaled → full.
